metadata.description: Open Claude Code plugins from Luminik. Practical agents and skills for AEs, SDRs, and event marketers running pre-event outbound and dinner/side-event invites at B2B trade shows and conferences. Founders doing their own event outbound, welcome too.

plugins.name: event-outbound
plugins.description: Generate validated multi-channel pre-event outbound sequences for AEs, SDRs, and event marketers working B2B trade shows, conferences, and industry events. Event + ICP + personas in, email + LinkedIn sequences across a 1-8 week lead-time window out, one per persona. Built on 20k+ personalised touches across 50+ events that sourced $6M+ in pipeline across fintech (identity verification), cybersecurity, and B2B SaaS. Every touch is validated: subject ≤4 words lowercase no digits, channel-aware body length (50-100 words / 3-5 sentences for cold email, 18-35 for LinkedIn connection requests), pronoun ratio favouring the reader, illumination question on first-touch + post-connect, lean-back permission-based CTAs over meeting-asks, no buzzwords / leading questions / emoji / em-dashes, plus a 195-phrase 10-category LLM-cliche blocklist (performative empathy, sales-speak openers, marketing buzzwords, lazy-generalization openers, LLM transition tics, GPT vocabulary, and more) sourced from Stanford CRFM, GPTZero, the Lavender Live transcript, and the Gong / 30MPC / Outbound Squad 85M-email Ultimate Cold Email Data Report. Failures retry 3x; touches that exhaust retries ship with rules_violated for human review. Output ships as markdown with per-touch 0-5 quality score (top-tier / ship / review / rewrite) plus sequence summary. Two fully-rendered worked examples in the repo (RSA Conference 2026 cyber, Money20/20 Europe 2026 fintech) and an input-fixture set for Singapore Fintech Festival 2026.
